subject: Time Machine backup failed with sparse error message
description: Time Machine reports backup could not complete; user needs data protected before travel.

ts_steps.title: Check disk space
ts_steps.action: On backup volume ensure free space ≥ estimated backup size; thin old snapshots if UI allows.

ts_steps.title: Run First Aid
ts_steps.action: Disk Utility — First Aid on backup volume and internal volume (if policy allows).

ts_steps.title: Exclude large transient folders
ts_steps.action: Time Machine Options — exclude caches or VM images that balloon; run backup again.

internal_information: Corrupt sparsebundle, full disk, or APFS snapshot issues. May need new backup disk if hardware failing.
